name: Markdown to HTML
description: Render a Markdown file to a self-contained, styled HTML page with sticky header, sidebar nav, syntax-highlighted code, callout boxes, Mermaid diagram support, and print-ready styles. Deterministic via marked + highlight.js; the agent only invokes scripts/render.js.
author: dropkit

input.arguments: input.md path plus optional flags (e.g. notes/weekly.md --theme green --output weekly.html)

output.layout: single self-contained HTML file; only external dependency is the Mermaid CDN (skipped with --no-mermaid)
